scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload
scripts.dev: pnpm dev:db && sleep 2 && pnpm dev:backend & pnpm dev:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff check app
scripts.lint:backend:fix: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff check --fix app
scripts.format:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff format app

apps/backend/**/*.py: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff check --fix
cd apps/backend && uv run ruff format
